title: Building Your Own Pwnagotchi: The AI-Powered Wi-Fi Capturing Companion
excerpt: A Pwnagotchi is a Raspberry Pi Zero device that uses machine learning to capture Wi-Fi handshakes more efficiently.

title: Building a Passive GSM IMSI Catcher with RTL-SDR and gr-gsm
excerpt: A passive GSM IMSI catcher built with a cheap RTL-SDR dongle and gr-gsm that captures unique phone identifiers from nearby mobile devices.
